describe: Attachments are deduplicated by content hash through the workspace seam: the first put of given bytes stores one blob (stored_new=true, refcount=1); a second put of IDENTICAL bytes stores nothing new and only bumps the refcount (stored_new=false, refcount=2) — same content hash, and quota.status attachments bytes are unchanged across the dedup hit. Distinct bytes get a distinct hash and add accounted bytes.
